objective: Run deterministic and small learned baselines on the compact exact projections selected by Wave 53.
non_negotiables: Baselines must use the Wave 52 exact mixed-hook shard and the same train/dev/test split.
Topology-family and net-material results must be interpreted separately: net material is a material-control target, not decomposition-aware value learning.
A learned model result must be compared against train-majority, FEN/material majority, and component-signature metadata controls.
No decomposition-benefit claim activates if topology test accuracy does not improve over the deterministic majority floor.

tasks.prompt: Implement and run exact-projection baseline reports with majority, FEN/material, signature-metadata, and multiclass logistic probes.
outputs: Wave 54 compact exact projection baseline report
Python smoke coverage for the new report
acceptance: The report covers component_topology_family and net_material_balance on 60 exact rows.
Each target reports train-majority, FEN/material majority, signature-metadata majority, FEN/material multiclass logistic, and signature-metadata multiclass logistic predictors.
The report records split metrics for train/dev/test and preserves unseen-label accounting.
The report hash is recorded in docs.

tasks.prompt: Assess whether any compact exact projection baseline clears a credible model-evidence gate.
acceptance: component_topology_family has no test improvement over the train-majority floor of 0.2857.
net_material_balance reaches test accuracy 0.5714 under material/signature controls and is recorded as a material-control target.
The next wave is routed toward exact-support expansion and stronger ablations before model claims.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 54 as a compact-projection baseline gate and keep decomposition/model claims blocked.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that Wave 54 is a baseline/no-go gate, not decomposition-benefit evidence.
Docs route Wave 55 toward exact support expansion and ablation design.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_54_compact_exact_projection_baselines.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 54 plan is internally consistent.
The compact exact-projection baseline report is reproducible.
